KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.title: Mr. Hat
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.descr: At the end of your turn, randomly play a card with [gold]Unconscious[/gold] from your hand. Right-click to view Koishi's generated cards.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_STARTER_RELIC.flavo: Mr. Hat is my good friend.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.title: Mr. Hat with Roses
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.descr: At the end of your turn, randomly play a card with [gold]Unconscious[/gold] from your hand. Whenever you play a card with [gold]Unconscious[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Thorns[/gold]. Right-click to view Koishi's generated cards.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_ANICENT_RELIC.flavo: A good friend brought some flowers for Mr. Hat.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LING_YI_DIAN_HUA_RELIC.des: On pickup, choose {Cards} cards in your deck. Enchant them with [gold]At Ease[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LING_YI_DIAN_HUA_RELIC.fla: "Hello, hello, this is Koishi! I'm behind you right now~"
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SATORI_BERET_KOISHI.title: Satori's Beret
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SATORI_BERET_KOISHI.descri: The first time you enter [gold]Bloom[/gold] each combat, draw {Cards} additional card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RINS_CART_KOISHI.title: Rin's Cart
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RINS_CART_KOISHI.descripti: Whenever a creature dies, draw {Cards} card(s).
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RINS_CART_KOISHI.flavor: Rin loves collecting corpses and playing with them. Lady Ran of the Yakumo family once complained about it.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-OKUUS_SECRET_EYE_KOISHI.de: For each {Energy}{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} spent, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-OKUUS_SECRET_EYE_KOISHI.fl: A hell raven can master this power perfectly. In theory, she is extremely dangerous, but fortunately she is also an idiot.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MASK_OF_HOPE_RELIC.title: Mask of Hope
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MASK_OF_HOPE_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each combat, the first card you play costs 0.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FUMO_CARD_RELIC_KOISHI.des: At the start of each combat, add {Cards} random [gold]Fumo[/gold] card(s) to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FUMO_CARD_RELIC_KOISHI.fla: The outside world's trendiest card! They say it sold out everywhere!
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_BOUQUET_KOISHI.title: Rose Bouquet
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_BOUQUET_KOISHI.descri: At the start of each combat, all 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cards deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_BOUQUET_KOISHI.flavor: If you want it, come take it yourself.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-IDOLS_MICROPHONE_KOISHI.de: The first [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card you play each turn returns to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-IDOLS_MICROPHONE_KOISHI.fl: Koishi really does have idol potential.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DIM_LIGHT_CANDLE_KOISHI.de: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP. Triggers up to [blue]6[/blue] times each combat.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DIM_LIGHT_CANDLE_KOISHI.fl: It seems like it could sit on Mr. Hat...
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUWAKOS_HAT_KOISHI.title: Suwako's Hat
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUWAKOS_HAT_KOISHI.descrip: Cards you draw have their costs randomized. At the start of each turn, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s) from your draw pile and add them to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUWAKOS_HAT_KOISHI.selecti: Choose a card to add to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUWAKOS_HAT_KOISHI.flavor: The moment she sees you, she puts a hat on you.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ONBASHIRA_KOISHI.title: Onbashira
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ONBASHIRA_KOISHI.descripti: At the start of combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Onbashira[/gold] to your draw pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ONBASHIRA_KOISHI.flavor: A terrifying power. Anyone hit by it is too scared to speak.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TINY_WHITE_SNAKE_KOISHI.fl: Does this really count as tiny?
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KANAKOS_SHIMENAWA_KOISHI.d: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KANAKOS_SHIMENAWA_KOISHI.f: Why are counterfeit goods being sold?
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FROG_CLOTHES_KOISHI.title: Frog Clothes
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FROG_CLOTHES_KOISHI.descri: If you have not played any cards this turn, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP at end of turn.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FROG_CLOTHES_KOISHI.flavor: After putting it on, you feel like croaking.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NUCLEAR_MANAGEMENT_MANUAL_: At end of turn, randomly [gold]Exhaust[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s) in your hand. Whenever you have exhausted [blue]{ExhaustThreshold}[/blue] cards in total, gain a relic at the end of combat.
Rule one: do not let an idiot follow the instructions.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FROG_CARD_KOISHI.title: Frog Card
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FROG_CARD_KOISHI.descripti: On pickup, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Explosive Red Frog[/gold] to your deck.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MOUNTAIN_GODS_BLESSING_KOI: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. At end of turn, if your hand has [blue]{HandThreshold}[/blue] or fewer cards, take [red]{Damage}[/red] damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIRACLE_GOHEI_KOISHI.title: Miracle Gohei
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIRACLE_GOHEI_KOISHI.descr: On pickup, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s). Enchant them with [gold]Miracle[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIRACLE_GOHEI_KOISHI.flavo: They say one used by a shrine maiden sells more easily.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKOS_BOW_KOISHI.title: Miko's Bow
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKOS_BOW_KOISHI.descripti: On pickup, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s). Enchant them with [gold]Flying[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKOS_BOW_KOISHI.flavor: They say many people use this to recognize Reimu.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKO_BLESSING_KOISHI.title: Miko Blessing
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKO_BLESSING_KOISHI.descr: Each combat, prevent the first [blue]{Immunities}[/blue] instances of damage greater than [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MIKO_BLESSING_KOISHI.flavo: For just 5000 yen, you can receive the Hakurei shrine maiden's blessing!
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HAKUREI_TORII_KOISHI.title: Hakurei Torii
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HAKUREI_TORII_KOISHI.descr: When you take less than [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] damage, reduce it to 0 and heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HAKUREI_TORII_KOISHI.flavo: A tiny torii model with the power to ward off calamity.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-YIN_YANG_GHOST_GOD_ORB_REL: On pickup, add an upgraded [gold]Yin-Yang Ghost God Orb[/gold] to your deck.
Danmaku that is almost impossible to withstand!
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MINI_SAISEN_BOX_KOISHI.des: No longer gain Gold. Damage you deal and Block you gain are increased by [blue]{BonusPercent}[/blue]%.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MINI_SAISEN_BOX_KOISHI.fla: She gave it to you so you could ask others to put money in it.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RED_TIE_KOISHI.title: Red Tie
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RED_TIE_KOISHI.description: On pickup, transform all Attack cards in your deck into [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] and enchant them with [gold]Miracle[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RED_TIE_KOISHI.flavor: Something Reimu always keeps with her. Please protect it well.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-EXORCISM_AMULET_KOISHI.des: When you draw a [green]Status[/green] or [red]Curse[/red], exhaust it and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s).
KOMEIJIKOISHI-EXORCISM_AMULET_KOISHI.fla: An amulet no calamity can pierce.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FREE_GOHEI_KOISHI.title: Free Gohei
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FREE_GOHEI_KOISHI.descript: Cards that cost [blue]{CostThreshold}[/blue] or more cost 1 less. You can play at most [blue]{AttackLimit}[/blue] Attack cards each turn.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FREE_GOHEI_KOISHI.flavor: Reimu always thought a gohei that could exterminate things by itself would be convenient.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each combat, after taking damage [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] times, this becomes disabled.
Why are you carrying this around!?
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMAINU_STONE_CARVING_KOIS: At the start of combat, gain [blue]{GuardianPower}[/blue] [gold]Guardian[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NIGHT_SPARROW_WINGS_KOISHI: Whenever you kill an enemy, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
Tiny wings bearing a delicious (crossed out) grand dream.
